Title: Create a PuntinaMappa object with valid parameters
Test Data: longitudine = 12.345, latitudine = 67.890, qualitaAria = 50, temperatura = 25, statoMeteo = "Soleggiato", umidita = 0.6, vento = 10.5, pressione = 1013, categoria = "Moderata"
Test Steps:

Test Data: longitudine = 12.345, latitudine = 67.890, qualitaAria = 50, temperatura = 25, statoMeteo = "Soleggiato", umidita = 0.6, vento = 10.5, pressione = 1013, categoria = "Moderata"

Title: Select state, region, and city from initial screen
Test Steps:
1. Select the state "Italy".
2. Select the region "Lombardy".
3. Select the city "Milan".
4. Initiate the request to the server.
Expected Result: The selection process completes successfully, and the request to the server is initiated.

Title: Display data returned from server
Preconditions: Request to server has been made
Test Steps:
1. Receive data from the server.
2. Display the received data.
Expected Result: The data is displayed correctly on the screen.

Title: Refresh map data on scroll down
Test Steps:
1. Scroll down on the map.
2. Initiate the process of refreshing the map.
3. Send a request to the server for updated map data.
4. Update the map display with the new data.
Expected Result: The map is refreshed with the latest data upon scrolling down.

Title: Navigate to suggestions screen from initial map
Test Steps:
1. Press the button to navigate to the suggestions screen.
2. Display the suggestions screen.
Expected Result: The user is navigated to the suggestions screen successfully.

Title: Start application and load countries from AirVisual API
Test Steps:
1. Start the application.
2. Call the AirVisual API to load countries.
Expected Result: The application starts successfully, and the list of countries is loaded from the API.

Title: Handle data received from AirVisual API
Preconditions: Data has been received from the AirVisual API
Test Steps:
1. Process the data received from the AirVisual API.
2. Present the data to the user.
Expected Result: The data is processed and presented correctly to the user.

Title: Update widget data from AirVisual API
Test Steps:
1. Enable the widget.
2. Request data from the AirVisual API.
3. Present the retrieved data to the user.
Expected Result: The widget updates successfully with the latest data from the API.

Title: Refresh map data via WebView
Preconditions: User wants to view the map
Test Steps:
1. User requests to view the map.
2. WebView refreshes the data from the AirVisual API.
3. Present the updated data to the user.
Expected Result: The map data is refreshed and displayed correctly.

Title: Retrieve and display tips based on AQI
Test Steps:
1. User selects a nation, region, and city of interest.
2. Retrieve tips based on the AQI of the selected location.
3. Present the retrieved tips to the user.
Expected Result: The tips are retrieved and displayed correctly based on the AQI.

Title: Handle failure in refreshing map data
Test Steps:
1. Scroll down on the map.
2. Initiate the process of refreshing the map.
3. Simulate a failure in sending the request to the server.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the failure in refreshing the map data.

Title: Handle failure in navigating to suggestions screen
Test Steps:
1. Press the button to navigate to the suggestions screen.
2. Simulate a failure in transitioning to the suggestions screen.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the failure in navigating to the suggestions screen.

Title: Handle failure in loading countries from AirVisual API
Test Steps:
1. Start the application.
2. Call the AirVisual API to load countries.
3. Simulate a failure in loading countries.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the failure in loading countries.

Title: Handle failure in handling data from AirVisual API
Preconditions: Data has been received from the AirVisual API
Test Steps:
1. Process the data received from the AirVisual API.
2. Simulate a failure in processing the data.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the failure in handling the data.

Title: Handle failure in updating widget data
Test Steps:
1. Enable the widget.
2. Request data from the AirVisual API.
3. Simulate a failure in retrieving data.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the failure in updating the widget data.

Title: Handle failure in refreshing map data via WebView
Preconditions: User wants to view the map
Test Steps:
1. User requests to view the map.
2. WebView attempts to refresh the data from the AirVisual API.
3. Simulate a failure in refreshing the data.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the failure in refreshing the map data.

Title: Handle failure in retrieving tips based on AQI
Test Steps:
1. User selects a nation, region, and city of interest.
2. Attempt to retrieve tips based on the AQI of the selected location.
3. Simulate a failure in retrieving the tips.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the failure in retrieving the tips.
